quote_of_day.text:
Why the fuck do rich Muslims mog the shit out of rich Hindus every single time?

Rich Hindus are usually fat potbellied baniya types, noodle-armed studymaxxing pongas, Subboraginal Dravidian CEOs, Chamaroid babus and Bhangi politicians.

>inb4 pasmanda

Allah Ek Randi Ka Pillah
quote_of_day.name: Jewgenics

articles.title: Anon comments on physical attributes of black men
articles.body:
Anon initiated a discussion by stating that black men look mature and manly, comparing them to grown men abusing little girls. One respondent, Elephant, provided background information on Greg Lanksy, an individual associated with porn production.

Another anon noted that some people try to frame issues as a conflict between Jews and Muslims, while others assume one can't dislike Abrahamic religions as a whole.

Anon also mentioned physical attributes of black men, including their phenotype, thick necks, skull shape, musculature, and deep voice, which make them appear mature for their age.

A respondent jokingly attributed the perceived physical maturity of black men to genetics, suggesting that it's an individual-level trait.

Anon brought up the topic of porn consumption, stating that white boys are the biggest consumers of blacked porn and that Jewish entrepreneurs merely supply the demand. Elephant countered that Jews have media and financial control, making them a significant threat.

Anon discussed the idea that Jews want to normalize pedophilia and profit from it, while another respondent argued that the demand for such content exists and that Jews are simply meeting it.

Anon reflected on the grooming of young girls in the porn industry, citing examples from India and the prevalence of underage girls in porn movies.

articles.title: Anon Claims Jews Control India, Sparks Denials and Accusations
articles.body:
Anon posted a threat to "expose Jews" and claimed India is controlled by them, sparking a heated discussion.

Another anon responded by mentioning the role of Jewish leaders in the 1960s feminist movement, citing names like Betty Friedan, Phyllis Chesler, and Gloria Steinem.

The original poster claimed they have proof that India is controlled by Jews, but others disputed this, with one anon suggesting that the poster might be Jewish themselves with an Indian VPN.

Accusations of being "retarded" and making "weasel claims" were thrown around. The conversation took a dark turn with posts expressing anti-Semitic sentiments, including a claim that Jews are "parasitic creatures" and that they will be "burned" along with Muslims.

Some anons also made references to Jewish control of various entities, including the East India Company. The thread was marked by a tone of hostility and conspiracy theories, with some anons accusing others of being Jewish or defending Jewish interests.

The discussion was filled with inflammatory language and personal attacks.

articles.title: Rich Muslims Outmaneuvering Rich Hindus, Poster Wonders
articles.body:
Jewgenics kicked off the discussion by questioning why rich Muslims seem to outmaneuver rich Hindus every time.

They described rich Hindus as typically being 'fat potbellied baniya types, noodle-armed studymaxxing pongas, Subboraginal Dravidian CEOs, Chamaroid babus and Bhangi politicians.' Anon responded by pointing out that Jewgenics' own description of rich Hindus might be the reason they are outmaneuvered.

Another anon chimed in, suggesting that rich Hindus might not actually be rich, and that their appearance might be a factor. Some anons made specific claims about individual groups, with one stating that Chitpavans brahmins are from Iran.

Others mentioned specific Indian families and individuals, such as the Scindias, Pajeet Dobhal, and Adanis son. The discussion also touched on the topic of historical figures, with one anon mentioning Bheemrao lundbedkar.

The tone of the discussion was often lighthearted and joking, with anons making humorous remarks and personal attacks.

The conversation did not seem to arrive at a definitive conclusion, but rather continued to explore and poke fun at the idea that rich Muslims might have an advantage over rich Hindus.

articles.title: Anon ponders famine's approach
articles.body:
Anon asked how others plan to deal with an upcoming famine. Another anon responded that the COVID-19 pandemic did not kill enough people, suggesting that those who survived would have been better off with a 'cool name' like 'Child of Pestilence'.

One respondent stated that an actual famine killing the bottom 60% of the population would be a 'godsend', comparing it to the impact of the Black Death in Europe.

Anon also mentioned that 30% of the population died in the 17th century due to famine and wars.

articles.title: Anon laments dehati influx on Indiachan
articles.body:
Anon posted about an apparent influx of dehatis on Indiachan, claiming the board has never been of lower quality.

They stated that even the worst posters previously had some redeeming qualities like being funny.

Another anon disagreed, recalling that trolling was previously kept to a limit and most boards remained normal.

A respondent suggested that new posters lack experience and decorum, leading to poor discussions.

Anon also discussed a past incident involving NCR and street shitters, while another brought up a 'summerfag' remark. Conversations also touched on hashed IP addresses and anonymity.
